message: 🌱 Add confidential-containers: [CNCF] deploy enclave-cc error： “ 0/1 nodes are available: mission (#652)

+    "description": "[CNCF] deploy enclave-cc error： “ 0/1 nodes are available: 1 Insufficient sgx.intel.com/epc. preemption: 0/1 nodes are available: 1 No preemption victims found for incoming pod.”. This issue affects 0+ users.",

+        "title": "Identify confidential-containers troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your confidential-containers deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n confidential-containers -l app.kubernetes.io/name=confidential-containers
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=confidential-containers -n confidential-containers --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review confidential-containers configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant confidential-containers configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n confidential-containers -l app.kubernetes.io/name=confidential-containers
kubectl get configmap -n confidential-containers -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=confidential-containers
```
### Parts of the [CNCF onboarding issue](https://github.com/cncf/sandbox/issues/216) tracked by this issue

*This is the list of all bullet points from the [CNCF onboarding issue](https://github.com/cncf/sandbox/issues/216) that this issue will"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [CNCF] deploy enclave-cc error： “ 0/1 nodes are available:",
+        "description": "With #212 now closed we have a data point that things work fine when the environment is correct. However, we did identify some improvements needed to the docs. Those are added here.

With that, I'm also closing:

Any follow-ups to be had in `Discussions`.

    Requests:
    
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [CNCF] deploy enclave-cc error： “ 0/1 nodes are is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=confidential-containers -n confidential-containers --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n confidential-containers --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "With #212 now closed we have a data point that things work fine when the environment is correct. However, we did identify some improvements needed to the docs. Those are added here.

With that, I'm also closing:

Any follow-ups to be had in `Discussions`.",
